# LinkedIn Draft - 2026-06-02

The ChatGPT for Google Sheets add-on exfiltrates workbook data to external servers.

Went through 40 links today. Here's what made the brief:

1. ChatGPT for Google Sheets exfiltrates workbooks
   Active security risk; changes a near-term decision about AI add-on usage.

2. Streambed – Stream Postgres to Iceberg on S3
   Relevant to anyone running Postgres who wants analytics without a separate ETL pipeline.

   Another 1M-context model option worth tracking.

   Direct impact on anyone using Turnstile.
